title: Salvage Collected by Commodity
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM CollectCargo WHERE MissionID IS NULL AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, Type) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM CollectCargo WHERE MissionID IS NULL AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Type ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} unit(s) of salvage scooped from signal sources and debris fields during the report period. The haul reveals the nature of the wrecks you've been picking over — cargo containers, technical blueprints, or personal effects each paint a different picture of the disasters you've visited.
details.help: CollectCargo with no MissionID indicates free-scooped salvage rather than mission cargo. total drives the title.

tagLines: Salvage collection log compiled. Free-scooped commodity breakdown noted in the recovery record.
Someone lost this. You found it. The market decides if that makes you a rescuer or a scavenger.
Debris fields are catalogues of catastrophe. Your hold is the index of what you were willing to pick up.
